sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂגא

Transliteration: śâgâ'

Phonetic: saw-gaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to increase, grow, magnify, grow great
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to make great
      2. to magnify, laud

Origin: to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (fig) laud

TWOT entry: 2233

Part(s) of speech: Verb
